market_overview.headline: Broad market weakness with SPY, QQQ, and BTC all in Full Bear structures despite modest daily gains.
market_overview.detail: Only 37% of top 300 stocks in Full Bull mode while 37% are in Full Bear, showing market bifurcation. Both major indices showing bullish crossover potential signals early reversal opportunity.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic tech dominates momentum leaders with optical/semiconductor names like LITE, SNDK, and CIEN showing explosive moves. Energy minerals sector maintaining 100% bullish readings with strongest sector momentum.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Leading, Tech Services Lagging Severely

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 14 stocks in Full Bull structure.
Strong defensive positioning with infrastructure and services leading.
Materials sector showing solid bullish structure amid commodity strength.

weakest.note: Severe bear dominance with 87% of tech services in bearish structures.
Healthcare services under pressure with 75% bearish positioning.
Complete bearish domination with all stocks in bear structures.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into defensive sectors with energy and industrials leading. Technology services showing historic weakness with -74.2% net score suggesting major sector capitulation.

items.text: All three major indices (SPY, QQQ, BTC) in Full Bear structure despite daily gains
Technology services sector showing extreme bearish readings (-74.2% net score)
74.5% of financial stocks in bearish structures amid banking sector weakness
Market bifurcation with only 37% bulls vs 37% bears suggests lack of conviction

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Markets gained on speculation about potential Iran war resolution despite ongoing Middle East tensions. Intel surged 9% on Ireland fab buyback signaling renewed strength, while Eli Lilly secured FDA approval for obesity pill. Banking sector themes emerged with CNBC highlighting potential catalysts for beaten-down financial names.

items.text: Iran war resolution speculation drove broad market gains despite geopolitical uncertainty
Intel jumped 9% on $14.2B Ireland fab buyback showing renewed semiconductor confidence
Eli Lilly FDA obesity pill approval boosted healthcare sentiment
Banking sector analysis highlighted potential catalysts for WFC, GS recovery
Amazon cloud infrastructure reportedly damaged in Iran strike affecting tech sentiment
